text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried about Seiun Sky's recent lack of drive, I
decided to confront her, but she bails on me in
response.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo is just as worried and accompanies me
when I go to speak with her. Once we find Seiun
Sky, she tells us that she's sick of racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo is whipped into a rage. How could she
be saying this now? Seiun Sky was the one who
helped her find her own path with the words, "at
your final wrong turn, you'll have found the right
path."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo concludes that she misjudged her and
leaves. Seiun Sky then tells me she wants some
time alone.
